members.name: title
members.description: The title of the dialog. This is used for accessibility purposes and will be rendered in the header of the dialog if the `title` slot is not provided.

members.name: description
members.description: The description of the dialog. This is used for accessibility purposes and will be rendered in the content of the dialog if the `description` slot is not provided.

members.name: icon
members.type: string | import("vue").Component | VNode<import("vue").RendererNode, import("vue").RendererElement, { [key: string]: any; }> | null
members.description: The icon of the dialog. This is used for accessibility purposes and will be rendered in the header of the dialog if the `icon` slot is not provided.

referencedTypes.description: Type information for IconValue.

members.name: showClose
members.description: Whether show the close button in the header of the dialog.

members.name: pure
members.description:
Whether to use the pure version of the dialog, which does not include the header and footer.
This is useful when you want to fully control the content of the dialog and do not need the built-in header and footer.

members.name: showCancel
members.description:
Whether to show the cancel button.

When set to `onlyWarning`, the cancel button will only be shown when the dialog is an alert dialog with `alertType="warning"`.
When set to `true`, the cancel button will always be shown.

members.name: cancelText
members.description: The text of the cancel button. This is used for accessibility purposes and will be rendered in the footer of the dialog if the `cancel` slot is not provided.

members.name: showConfirm
members.description:
Whether to show the confirm button when the dialog is an alert dialog.

The default value is `true` when the dialog is an alert dialog.

members.name: confirmText
members.description: The text of the confirm button. This is used for accessibility purposes and will be rendered in the footer of the dialog if the `confirm` slot is not provided.

members.name: defer
members.description:
Defer the resolving of a Teleport target until other parts of the application have mounted (requires Vue 3.5.0+)

{@link https://vuejs.org/guide/built-ins/teleport.html#deferred-teleport}

members.name: isAlert
members.description:
Whether the dialog is an alert dialog. An alert dialog is a dialog that interrupts the user's workflow to communicate an important message and requires a response.

When set to `true`, the dialog will have `role="alertdialog"` and will require a `DialogTitle` to be provided. This is used for accessibility purposes.

members.name: alertType
members.description: The alert type of the dialog, which determines the default icon and styles when the dialog is an alert dialog.

referencedTypes.name: DialogAlertType
referencedTypes.resolvedType: 'success' | 'warning' | 'info' | 'error' | 'default'
referencedTypes.description: Supported dialog alert values.

members.name: open
members.description: The controlled open state of the dialog. Can be bound with `v-model:open`.

members.name: defaultOpen
members.description: The open state of the dialog when it is initially rendered. Use when you do not need to control its open state.

members.name: modal
members.description:
The modality of the dialog. When set to `true`, interaction with outside elements will be disabled and only dialog
content will be visible to screen readers.

emits.name: DialogEmits
emits.resolvedType: { "update:open": [value: boolean]; escapeKeyDown: [event: KeyboardEvent]; pointerDownOutside: [event: PointerDownOutsideEvent]; focusOutside: [event: FocusOutsideEvent]; interactOutside: [event: PointerDownOutsideEvent | FocusOutsideEvent]; openAutoFocus: [event: Event]; closeAutoFocus: [event: Event]; close: [event: MouseEvent]; confirm: [event: MouseEvent]; cancel: [event: MouseEvent] }

callables.name: update:open
callables.description: Event handler called when the open state of the dialog changes.

callables.name: escapeKeyDown
callables.description: Event handler called when the escape key is down. Can be prevented.

referencedTypes.name: KeyboardEvent
referencedTypes.description:
**`KeyboardEvent`** objects describe a user interaction with the keyboard; each event describes a single interaction between the user and a key (or combination of a key with modifier keys) on the keyboard. The event type (keydown, keypress, or keyup) identifies what kind of keyboard activity occurred.

[MDN Reference](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/API/KeyboardEvent)

callables.name: pointerDownOutside
callables.description: Event handler called when a `pointerdown` event happens outside of the `DismissableLayer`. Can be prevented.

callables.name: focusOutside
callables.description: Event handler called when the focus moves outside of the `DismissableLayer`. Can be prevented.

callables.name: interactOutside
callables.description:
Event handler called when an interaction happens outside the `DismissableLayer`. Specifically, when a `pointerdown`
event happens outside or focus moves outside of it. Can be prevented.

callables.name: openAutoFocus
callables.description: Event handler called when auto-focusing on open. Can be prevented.

referencedTypes.name: Event
referencedTypes.description:
The **`Event`** interface represents an event which takes place on an EventTarget.

[MDN Reference](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/API/Event)

callables.name: closeAutoFocus
callables.description: Event handler called when auto-focusing on close. Can be prevented.

referencedTypes.name: Event
referencedTypes.description:
The **`Event`** interface represents an event which takes place on an EventTarget.

[MDN Reference](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/API/Event)

callables.name: close
callables.description: Event handler called when the dialog is requested to be closed.

referencedTypes.name: MouseEvent
referencedTypes.description:
The **`MouseEvent`** interface represents events that occur due to the user interacting with a pointing device (such as a mouse). Common events using this interface include click, dblclick, mouseup, mousedown.

[MDN Reference](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/API/MouseEvent)

callables.name: confirm
callables.description: Event handler called when the dialog is requested to be closed by confirming.

referencedTypes.name: MouseEvent
referencedTypes.description:
The **`MouseEvent`** interface represents events that occur due to the user interacting with a pointing device (such as a mouse). Common events using this interface include click, dblclick, mouseup, mousedown.

[MDN Reference](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/API/MouseEvent)

callables.name: cancel
callables.description: Event handler called when the dialog is requested to be canceled.

members.name: isAlert
members.description:
Whether the dialog is an alert dialog. An alert dialog is a dialog that interrupts the user's workflow to communicate an important message and requires a response.

When set to `true`, the dialog will have `role="alertdialog"` and will require a `DialogTitle` to be provided. This is used for accessibility purposes.

members.name: alertType
members.description: The alert type of the dialog, which determines the default icon and styles when the dialog is an alert dialog.

referencedTypes.name: DialogAlertType
referencedTypes.resolvedType: 'success' | 'warning' | 'info' | 'error' | 'default'
referencedTypes.description: Supported dialog alert values.

members.name: open
members.description: The controlled open state of the dialog. Can be bound with `v-model:open`.

members.name: defaultOpen
members.description: The open state of the dialog when it is initially rendered. Use when you do not need to control its open state.

members.name: modal
members.description:
The modality of the dialog. When set to `true`, interaction with outside elements will be disabled and only dialog
content will be visible to screen readers.

emits.type: TypeAlias DialogCompactEmits: DialogRootEmits & BottomSheetPopupEmits & BottomSheetCloseEmits & BottomSheetConfirmEmits & BottomSheetCancelEmits

callables.name: update:open
callables.description: Event handler called when the open state of the dialog changes.

callables.name: escapeKeyDown
callables.description: Event handler called when the escape key is down. Can be prevented.

referencedTypes.name: KeyboardEvent
referencedTypes.description:
**`KeyboardEvent`** objects describe a user interaction with the keyboard; each event describes a single interaction between the user and a key (or combination of a key with modifier keys) on the keyboard. The event type (keydown, keypress, or keyup) identifies what kind of keyboard activity occurred.

[MDN Reference](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/API/KeyboardEvent)

callables.name: pointerDownOutside
callables.description: Event handler called when a `pointerdown` event happens outside of the `DismissableLayer`. Can be prevented.

callables.name: focusOutside
callables.description: Event handler called when the focus moves outside of the `DismissableLayer`. Can be prevented.

callables.name: interactOutside
callables.description:
Event handler called when an interaction happens outside the `DismissableLayer`. Specifically, when a `pointerdown`
event happens outside or focus moves outside of it. Can be prevented.

callables.name: openAutoFocus
callables.description: Event handler called when auto-focusing on open. Can be prevented.

referencedTypes.name: Event
referencedTypes.description:
The **`Event`** interface represents an event which takes place on an EventTarget.

[MDN Reference](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/API/Event)

callables.name: closeAutoFocus
callables.description: Event handler called when auto-focusing on close. Can be prevented.

referencedTypes.name: Event
referencedTypes.description:
The **`Event`** interface represents an event which takes place on an EventTarget.

[MDN Reference](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/API/Event)

callables.name: close
callables.description: Event handler called when the dialog is requested to be closed.

referencedTypes.name: MouseEvent
referencedTypes.description:
The **`MouseEvent`** interface represents events that occur due to the user interacting with a pointing device (such as a mouse). Common events using this interface include click, dblclick, mouseup, mousedown.

[MDN Reference](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/API/MouseEvent)

callables.name: confirm
callables.description: Event handler called when the dialog is requested to be closed by confirming.

referencedTypes.name: MouseEvent
referencedTypes.description:
The **`MouseEvent`** interface represents events that occur due to the user interacting with a pointing device (such as a mouse). Common events using this interface include click, dblclick, mouseup, mousedown.

[MDN Reference](https://developer.mozilla.org/docs/Web/API/MouseEvent)

callables.name: cancel
callables.description: Event handler called when the dialog is requested to be canceled.

The **`MouseEvent`** interface represents events that occur due to the user interacting with a pointing device (such as a mouse). Common events using this interface include click, dblclick, mouseup, mousedown.
